description_long: This is a well-worn plastic bottle of Dreft liquid dishwashing detergent, featuring a distinctive ribbed upper section and a red screw-on cap. The bottle is primarily off-white, with visible dirt and discoloration, suggesting it has been used and possibly discarded in an urban environment. The front label displays the Dreft logo in red, along with green text and pictograms indicating its use for dishwashing. The back of the bottle contains additional product information and instructions, partially faded and stained. The bottle's body is slightly deformed, with creases and dents, and the cap shows signs of wear. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on function over aesthetics.
description: A dirty, deformed off-white Dreft liquid dishwashing bottle with a ribbed neck and red screw-on cap, featuring worn labels and visible stains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Dreft logo, product name, and pictogram graphics on the main label, with the ribbed neck and red cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's narrow profile, ribbed neck, and visible dirt and creases along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying faded product information, instructions, and additional stains, with the ribbed neck and cap still prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's curvature, more dirt, and the edge of the front label partially visible.

license_info.creator_display_name: Archeoplastica: il museo dei rifiuti spiaggiati
